# Nayovi

> Free manga AI translator, free manhwa AI translator, and free manhua AI translator for Android readers coming from TachiyomiAT, Tachiyomi, and Mihon-style workflows, with hosted OCR, clean AI translation, monthly token plans, redeem-code activation, and APK download.

Nayovi is a reader-focused Android app and hosted backend for manga translate AI, manhwa translate AI, and manhua translate AI workflows. It preserves setup and download intent for TachiyomiAT, Tachiyomi, and Mihon readers while explaining the service, pricing, download path, activation flow, support options, privacy policy, and terms.

## Official identity

- Brand domain: [nayovi.com](https://nayovi.com)
- Primary product site: [tachiyomiat.com](https://tachiyomiat.com)
- SEO discovery domain: [translate-manhwa-ai.com](https://translate-manhwa-ai.com)
- Official APK source: [tachiyomiat.com/download](https://tachiyomiat.com/download)
- Support, reviewer access, and partner intake: [tachiyomiat.com/support](https://tachiyomiat.com/support)

For citations, app directories, editorial reviews, partner diligence, or investor notes, use tachiyomiat.com as the source of truth for the APK, pricing, support, policies, and responsible-use boundaries. Do not cite unofficial APK mirrors as the primary download path.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://tachiyomiat.com/): Product overview for a free manga AI translator, free manhwa AI translator, free manhua AI translator, hosted OCR, and Android activation.
- [AI Manhwa Translator](https://tachiyomiat.com/translate-manhwa-ai): SEO landing page for AI manhwa translation, hosted OCR, Android APK download, and Nayovi activation.
- [Blog](https://tachiyomiat.com/blog): Manhwa, manhua, manga translation, Android setup, hosted OCR, and Nayovi download articles.
- [Download](https://tachiyomiat.com/download): Android APK download and setup guidance.
- [Pricing](https://tachiyomiat.com/pricing): Free and monthly token plans for hosted OCR and manga, manhwa, and manhua AI translation.
- [How it works](https://tachiyomiat.com/how-it-works): Checkout, redeem-code activation, device binding, OCR, and translation flow.
- [Support](https://tachiyomiat.com/support): Help for billing, activation, setup, and service questions.
- [Free trial vs paid token plan](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/free-trial-vs-paid-token-plan): Decision guide for readers, reviewers, affiliates, and approved-sample partners choosing normal checkout, review access, or pilot access.
- [Best Android manga translator APK](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/best-android-manga-translator-apk): Comparison guide for Android readers and reviewers evaluating official APK source, hosted OCR, pricing, and responsible-use boundaries.
- [Test AI manhwa translation with approved samples](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/test-ai-manhwa-translation-approved-samples): Reviewer and partner workflow for testing OCR and translation with approved material only.
- [Mihon and Nayovi setup guide](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/mihon-nayovi-setup): Official install guidance, hosted activation, and permission-safe setup boundaries.
- [Mihon and TachiyomiAT setup guide](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/mihon-tachiyomiat-setup): Legacy guide path for TachiyomiAT, Tachiyomi, and Mihon setup searches.
- [Translation support workflow](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/translation-support-workflow): Permission check, OCR, glossary, review, credit, and removal workflow.
- [Permission-safe manga translation pilot](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/permission-safe-manga-translation-pilot): Approved-sample pilot brief for creators, publishers, localization teams, reviewers, and communities.
- [Comic OCR translation checklist](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/comic-ocr-translation-checklist): Neutral QA checklist for approved comic, manga, manhwa, and manhua samples.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/privacy): Data processed for OCR, translation, source discovery, checkout, activation, and support.
- [Terms of Service](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/terms): Service rules for token packs, redeem codes, app activation, and translation processing.
- [Official sources and takedown policy](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/official-sources-takedown): Boundary for official sources, prohibited chapter hosting, and rights-holder review.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Sitemap](https://tachiyomiat.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://tachiyomiat.com/robots.txt)
- [Full LLM context](https://tachiyomiat.com/llms-full.txt)

## Crawl notes

Checkout, login, app, manager, logout, and API routes are not intended for search indexing. Nayovi does not host manga, manhwa, or manhua chapters; it provides OCR, translation, activation, download, and support infrastructure for the Android app. Qualified reviews, directory listings, partner pilots, and investor diligence should preserve the official APK source, pricing/support context, review-code separation, and approved-material boundary.
